She was evaluated by Dr Kushnir and underwent surgery at Valley hospital on 9/7/22.
admitted at Southern hills hospital and underwent surgery by Dr Rives on 9/20/22.
The patient underwent evaluation at Mayo Clinics.
As per patient, she has been advised to continue on 5-FU/Leucovorin and Bevacizumab.
Patient completed palliative radiation to Abdominal wall metastasis.
01/21/2026: Patient reports not feeling well since last visit.
Patient underwent endoscopic evaluation of stump which revealed stump infection and was
Patient has failed four lines of therapy.
Patient started fruquintinib as fifth-line anti-VEGF therapy as
bridging treatment until G12D directed clinical trials become available. 01/21/2026: Patient discontinued fruquintinib
Patient scheduled for tertiary care consultation at Mayo Clinic on 02/04/2026 for further treatment options.
Patient previously received iron infusion with continued
- Patient discontinued fruquintinib on 01/14/2026 due to GI bleeding
based on the provider's statements to the medical scribe.

Rodriguez is a pleasant 43 year old woman with colon cancer.
found to have a mass at 35 cm.
Pathology was reported as adenocarcinoma, 3.5 X 2 cm, Grade 2, negative margins, negative for
lymphatic, vascular and perineural invasion, 6/36 positive nodes, 3 tumor deposits and was staged as T4a N2a.
op, she developed pneumomediastinum which resolved on its own.

She was started on FOLFIRI and Bevacizumab
Subsequently, she underwent PET scan and MRI pelvis in 08/23 and was
found to have large 13 cm pelvic mass c/w recurrent disease.
She underwent hysterectomy left oophorectomy and
Pathology did show metastatic colon cancer in left ovary.
MRI of abdomen did show single liver
metastases and evidence of peritoneal disease.

in 01/24 and was advised to continue chemotherapy for 3 more months.

She was advised to continue FOLFOX and Bevacizumab and she completed 4 cycles.
found to have stomal obstruction in 11/24 due to tumor and required surgery.
and she was started on Lonsurf and Bevacizumab in 02/25 and could not tolerate it.
re challenging with FOLFIRINOX and progressed.
